name: cheshire-terminal-agents
description: One-shot Cheshire Terminal Agents skill pack — dual-rail forge (Robinhood Chain + Solana), ERC-8004 registries, FunPump bonded launch / Launchpad V3, omni mint, zk-omni messaging, and the full RH crypto-agent open stack (swaps, LP, DCA, copy-trade, viem). Use when the user says install cheshire agents, one-shot RH skills, npm cheshire-terminal-agents skills, or wants the whole Cheshire pack.
